# findSelected(_:)

**Instance Method**

Begins a search for the selected content in your browser text view.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func findSelected(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object calling this method.

## Overview

UIKit calls this method when someone selects Use Selection for Find from an editing menu. Present the UI for finding text in your view, and use the selected text for the search. To present the standard operating system UI for finding text, and support standard keyboard shortcuts, add a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/UIKit/UIFindInteraction] to your browser text view.

## Finding and replacing text

- **promptForReplace(_:)**: Shows potential replacements for the selected content.
- **replace(_:)**: Removes the selected text and inputs the chosen replacement text.
- **addShortcut(_:)**: Adds a text-replacement shortcut to the edit dictionary.
